name: base-layout-grid-integration
stdout:
{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":553208,"duration_api_ms":517018,"num_turns":58,"result":"Step 5 complete. Summary:

- **`BaseLayoutProps.sidebar?: SidebarProps`** added (BaseLayout.types.ts) — optional, BC-preserving for v0.2 callers.
- **BaseLayout.astro** renders `<Sidebar>` twice when `sidebar` is provided — once in `.site-shell__sidebar` (lg+ grid column) and once inside the existing `<details class="mobile-menu">` drawer. No new JS; the existing `<details>` pattern handles toggle.
- **layout.css** adds `.site-shell` / `.site-shell--with-sidebar` (lg+ grid `[var(--container-sidebar-w) 1fr]` with sticky sidebar column), and a `body.has-sidebar` hook that shifts the `.mobile-menu` hide breakpoint from md+ (v0.2) to lg+ (v0.3) so the drawer stays reachable in the 768–1024px band.
- **5 new tests** (15–19) cover sidebar-absent regression, sidebar-present + duplicate-id guard, activeSlug threading, canonical/og independence, and theme-init `<head>` preservation.
- **AC**: pnpm typecheck/lint clean, 548/548 tests pass (was 543), blog build OK, `obpub audit` 0 violations on apps/blog/dist, canaries 0.
